contraindications.contraindication_name: hypersensitivity to chlophedianol, dexchlorpheniramine, pseudoephedrine, or related compounds
contraindications.reason: Risk of allergic reaction including anaphylaxis
Anticholinergic (chlophedianol, dexchlorpheniramine) and sympathomimetic (pseudoephedrine) effects raise intraocular pressure

contraindications.contraindication_name: urinary retention (prostatic hyperplasia, bladder neck obstruction)
contraindications.reason: Anticholinergic agents impair bladder emptying
Anticholinergic effects delay gastric emptying
Dexchlorpheniramine and chlophedianol are contraindicated in this population due to risk of respiratory depression and paradoxical excitation
Pseudoephedrine can cause dangerous blood pressure elevation
Pseudoephedrine increases myocardial workload and may provoke ischemia

contraindications.contraindication_name: concurrent MAOI therapy or within 14 days
contraindications.reason: Hypertensive crisis with pseudoephedrine; possible potentiation of central effects of chlophedianol; additive anticholinergic effects
Pseudoephedrine may exacerbate tachycardia and tremor
Safety not established in this age group; anticholinergic and sympathomimetic risks
Pseudoephedrine may reduce milk supply; dexchlorpheniramine may cause infant sedation

contraindications.contraindication_name: hypersensitivity to chlorcyclizine, phenylephrine, or related piperazine antihistamines
contraindications.reason: Allergic reaction risk
Chlorcyclizine anticholinergic and phenylephrine sympathomimetic effects raise intraocular pressure

contraindications.contraindication_name: urinary retention (prostatic hyperplasia, bladder neck obstruction)
contraindications.reason: Anticholinergic effect of chlorcyclizine impairs micturition
Anticholinergic inhibition of gastric motility
Chlorcyclizine is contraindicated in this age group
Phenylephrine vasopressor effect may cause dangerous BP elevation
Phenylephrine increases afterload and myocardial oxygen demand

contraindications.contraindication_name: concurrent MAOI therapy or within 14 days
contraindications.reason: Hypertensive crisis with phenylephrine; additive anticholinergic effects with chlorcyclizine
Phenylephrine may worsen tachycardia and tremor
Not recommended for cough and cold in this population
Chlorcyclizine may cause sedation in nursing infant; phenylephrine may decrease milk supply

contraindications.contraindication_name: hypersensitivity to chlorpheniramine, phenylephrine, phenyltoloxamine, or related antihistamines
contraindications.reason: Anaphylaxis and severe hypersensitivity possible
Strong anticholinergic burden from two antihistamines plus phenylephrine sympathomimetic effect raises IOP

Significant anticholinergic effect delays gastric emptying
Antihistamines are contraindicated in this population
Phenylephrine vasoconstriction can cause dangerous BP elevation
Phenylephrine increases cardiac workload and may provoke ischemia

contraindications.contraindication_name: concurrent MAOI therapy or within 14 days
contraindications.reason: Hypertensive crisis with phenylephrine; excessive anticholinergic effects with antihistamines
Phenylephrine may worsen tachycardia
Not recommended in young children due to safety concerns
Antihistamines may sedate infant; phenylephrine may reduce milk supply

contraindications.contraindication_name: acute or severe bronchial asthma in unmonitored settings or without resuscitative equipment
contraindications.reason: Codeine-induced respiratory depression can be fatal

contraindications.contraindication_name: known or suspected gastrointestinal obstruction, including paralytic ileus
contraindications.reason: Codeine reduces peristalsis and may worsen obstruction
Codeine directly suppresses respiratory drive

contraindications.contraindication_name: head injury or elevated intracranial pressure
contraindications.reason: Codeine increases CO2 retention and cerebral vasodilation, raising ICP
Chlorpheniramine anticholinergic and pseudoephedrine sympathomimetic effects increase IOP

contraindications.reason: Chlorpheniramine anticholinergic action impairs voiding

contraindications.contraindication_name: concurrent MAOI therapy or within 14 days
contraindications.reason: Hypertensive crisis with pseudoephedrine; serotonin syndrome with codeine; additive anticholinergic effects

contraindications.contraindication_name: children under 12 years of age (for cough and cold)
contraindications.reason: FDA contraindicated due to risk of life-threatening respiratory depression from codeine
Codeine passes into breastmilk and may cause respiratory depression in the nursing infant, especially in ultrarapid metabolizers
Increased conversion of codeine to morphine, elevating risk of respiratory depression
Pseudoephedrine may exacerbate symptoms
